attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.DOCUMENT_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.DATATYPE_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.CATEGORY_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.SECURITY_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.SECURITY_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.PUBLISH_FLAG, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.IMAGE_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.STORAGE_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.USAGE_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.APP_SOURCE_VERSION, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.DM_NODE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.DM_FOLDER_PATH, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.DM_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.DM_DOCUMENT_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.DM_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.URL, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.MEDIA_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS,
(
 select DOCUMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS
 minus
 select DOCUMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.DOCUMENT_ID = STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.DOCUMENT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME
